title: Loot Box Lockdown
description: Guide rolling loot boxes through matching color gates by swiping lanes and tapping to seal any crate that suddenly gets stamped 16+.

howToPlayJson.title: Loot Box Lockdown
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 2-4 minute shipment rush by routing legal loot boxes through same-color gates, quarantining newly restricted boxes, and building the highest combo before one illegal crate slips through or a good crate is destroyed.

controls.outcome: Move the active loot box courier between the three conveyor lanes.
Flip that crate shut so it can enter a quarantine gate instead of a color gate.

controls.input: Tap and hold for a brief beat on a glowing multiplier badge
controls.outcome: Bank the current combo multiplier before the next crackdown wave can break it.

steps: Colored loot boxes roll toward matching gates on three lanes; send each open box through a gate of the same color.
Every few seconds, a siren and red PEGI 16 stamp mark one box color as restricted; boxes of that color must be tapped shut and diverted into
howToPlayJson.scoring: Each correct color match scores points and increases combo. Sealed restricted boxes scored through quarantine preserve the combo and add a smaller bonus. Banking a glowing multiplier badge converts the live combo into a
tips: Watch the warning siren: the next restricted color flashes a beat early.
Do not over-seal boxes; closed crates cannot score full color-match points.
Bank high multipliers before late-game crackdown waves stack two fast rule changes together.
Use short swipes, then tap immediately; the best runs come from treating sealing as lane control, not as panic cleanup.
